channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Trading on pavement, 20th April
item.description:
Trader encroaching well on to pavement Dangerous obstruction of walk way Encroachment has been increasing on regular basis 624 Hertford Road EN35TD

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hertford Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping next to recycling bank on Red Post Hill outside North Dulwich station, 20th April
item.description:
Flytipping next to recycling bank on Red Post Hill outside North Dulwich station

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Post Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on new modern council litter bin, 20th April
item.description:
Graffiti on new modern council litter bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches at eye level injury, 20th April
item.description:
This tree has branches that I and I notice other peoples have walked into or have to avoid branches also scratch the side and roof of parked cars as Hackney council planted the trees you are liable tree between 79/81 northwold road e5

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and sewage from drain from 11 Highland Road, 20th April
item.description:
There is consistently rubbish dumped outside 11 Highland Road, Bromley. In addition, the outside drain on the property seems to be blocked resulting in what appears to be sewage draining out of the front, onto the pavement and down the street. This has been going on for a few months at least. The smell is offensive.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover, 20th April
item.description:
This manhole cover a short distance west of the junction of station road and centre drive Epping is dangerously loose. Beginning to collapse into the hole and could possibly give way causing a serious accident.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing bench, 20th April
item.description:
Hello, the bench on the grassy area outside the bowling green on Ballards Lane is missing. When will this be replaced please? Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ballards Lane, Church End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rats, 20th April
item.description:
Rats are living in and around food waste bin they’ve chewed hole on bottom right corner and are constantly in and out of it , I’ve just watch for 2min and seen at least 4adult rats and smaller babies, now ther running back and forth to Lingfield house , there also on grassed area behind food waste bins there got to be a large nest all the pavement has lifted and broken , there also a waste bin there that needs to be removed rats are jumping in there too , never in the latest 6-8 months have I seen anyone clean it all needs to be removed and deep cleaned, the children play on that grass area they’ve got to be a priority , if it’s left any longer it’s gonna be hard to clear ,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fixed last week, broken again!, 20th April
item.description:
Again the kerb has been broken. No point repairing it as it just gets broken again! Drivers driving down the path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Longmeadow Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge amount of rubbish outside the back of a gym, 20th April
item.description:
So much rubbish dumped on top of bins that are open. Encouraging vermin and looks awful. Opposite primary school.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: HACKNEY HAVE LEFT RUBBLE FOR 8 months, 20th April
item.description:
HACKNEY COUNCIL have left the rubble from the paving that was dig up on the road for nearly ONE YEAR. Disgusting behaviour and taking up two PARKING SPAces. Will be writing to MPs councillors and newspapers now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hertford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture, 20th April
item.description:
Dumped seating in street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please remove, 20th April
item.description:
Remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing, 20th April
item.description:
Bin overflowing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnfield Wood Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on utilities cabinet, 20th April
item.description:
Graffiti on utilities cabinet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thurlow Park Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter along Southborough Lane and Frankswood avenue)even numbers side), 20th April
item.description:
Litter scattered around Southborough Lane (even numbers side) on grass and pavement, multiple places Needs manual waste-pickers to clean it regularly particularly after rubbish collections and after grass mowing. It looks like lots of rubbish is now scattered around, small papers, pieces of plastics, etc
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frankswood Avenue, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin (again), 20th April
item.description:
Large waste bin was emptied last week - already full/overflowing again. Needs to be emptied regularly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seven Sisters Road, Stroud Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Lakeswood road ( St James's church side), 20th April
item.description:
Litter scattered around Lakeswood road on grass and pavement, by the bushes of St James's church - in multiple places Please arrange a clean up now and regularly, thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lakeswood Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping around a tree, 20th April
item.description:
People fly tip around this tree every week. Can cameras be installed to catch them. It's clearly the same people and we are coking up to summer and if they continue to do it this regularly it will attract vermin.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pownall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 20th April
item.description:
Lots of junk left and more being added to it. There is quite a problem on Lawrie Park Road - Please remove asap to avoid more flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Lawrie Park Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
